name: bb_rsi_mean_reversion_us500_m15
hypothesis: On US500 M15, mean-reversion of BB extremes with RSI confirmation produces positive expectancy outside high-ADX trending regimes, generalizing the BB+RSI family to equity index behavior.

signals.entry_long: close < lower_bb(20, 2.0) AND rsi(7) < 15 AND bb_width > bb_width_percentile(200, 25)
signals.entry_short: close > upper_bb(20, 2.0) AND rsi(7) > 85 AND bb_width > bb_width_percentile(200, 25)

exits.take_profit: middle bollinger band (SMA20) as primary, opposite band as runner
exits.breakeven: move SL to entry after price tags middle band
